title: Ixora muelleri
taxonomy: Ixora muelleri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Ixora, which is native to tropical regions of the world. The genus Ixora is characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and is often used as an ornamental plant. Ixora muelleri is a type of shrub or small tree that is native to Australia. Within the Rubiaceae family, Ixora muelleri is closely related to other species of Ixora that share similar characteristics.
uses: Ixora muelleri is a plant species known to have various medicinal properties, but more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses. side_effects: Ixora muelleri is not commonly discussed regarding its side effects.
